title: Anichess Release Notes
content:
# Version 14.3.10

## ♟️ Spell Balance

**Juke** → Now has **4 Casts**.
**Shift** → Now has **6 Casts** and **can be Cast on King**.
**Plasma Beam** → Now has a **Range of 4**.
**Bis-Hop** → Now has **6 Casts**.

## 💡Optimizations
- Spell preview video now correctly displays the updated spell abilities
- Laptop view has been optimized

title: Anichess Release Notes
content:
# Version 14.3.9
**Release Date: Friday, June 5 2026**

## ♟️ Spell Balance

A new balance pass has been applied to improve spell diversity and strategic decision-making.

**Tactical Necessity** → Casts reduced to 4.
**Slip** → Now **steals 1 Mana**.
**Juke** → Now **steals 1 Mana** and has 8 Casts.
**Shift** → 2 Mana, 5 Casts, **can move unlimited spaces horizontally, can move through pieces, and cannot be cast on King.***
**Pengu Dive** → 3 Mana, 6 Casts, **can no longer be cast on Pawns.**
**Bis-Hop** → 3 Mana, 5 Casts.
**Pengu Blast** → 5 Mana, 2 Casts.
**Shot in the Dark** → 3 Mana, 3 Casts, **can no longer be cast on Queen.**
**Imposter** → 4 Mana, 3 Casts, **can no longer be cast on Pawns and King.**
**Parkour Mech** → 3 Mana, 2 Casts.
**House Recruit** → 4 Mana, 2 Casts.
**Power Infusion** → 8 Mana, 5 Casts.
**Queen Time** → 7 Mana, 1 Cast, **Can no longer capture King.**
**Pounce and Purr** → 4 Mana, 2 Casts.
**Transcendence** → 5 Mana, 2 Casts.

##  🔮 New Spell
**Chaos Summon**
**Mana Cost: 6**
**Casts: 2**
**Ability: Summons a Knight, Bishop, or Rook (30% chance each) on a square between ranks 2–7. Has a 10% chance to summon a Pawn instead.**

## 🖼️ Cosmetics Update

The following cosmetic set will be **unlocked for all players** for better visibility.

**ChessPiece: Chess.com**
**Chessboard: Chess.com**

The Chess.com **Background will remain exclusive** to the participants of the Chess.com Pre-Season Cup.
